name: Adani One Platinum

rewards.displayCategory: Adani One ecosystem spends (flights, hotels, airports, CNG, electricity, Trainman)

domestic: Domestic lounge: 2 complimentary visits per quarter via Visa Lounge Access; 8 per year total. Excluded from the standard ICICI Rs 75,000 quarterly spend threshold requirement.
2 complimentary domestic airport lounge accesses per quarter (8 per year)
2 complimentary premium domestic lounge upgrades per quarter at Adani-managed airports
Other airport perks: 2 complimentary premium lounge upgrades per quarter, 2 premium car parking and 2 valet car parking services per year, 4 domestic porter services per year.

joiningBenefitsValued.label: Flight ticket voucher worth Rs 2,000 on spending Rs 10,000 within 60 days of card activation
Hotel & holiday vouchers worth Rs 3,000 on card activation

joiningBenefits: Flight ticket voucher worth Rs 2,000 on spending Rs 10,000 within 60 days of card activation
Hotel & holiday vouchers worth Rs 3,000 on card activation

2 complimentary premium car parking and 2 valet car parking services per year at Adani-managed airports
4 complimentary domestic porter services per year at Adani-managed airports

additionalDetails: Annual fee of Rs 750 waived on spending Rs 3,00,000 or more in the preceding membership year (EMI excluded from spend calculation)
1 Adani Reward Point = Rs 1, redeemable exclusively on the Adani One app for flights, hotels, trains, buses, cabs, and duty-free shopping
Reward points credited to your Adani One account at end of each billing cycle

redemption.ecosystemLabel: Adani One app (flights, hotels, trains, duty-free)

internalNotes: Card details manually reviewed and verified by user on 2026-06-06
Official audit completed on 2026-06-06 using ICICI Bank and Adani One product pages and third-party verified sources.
Joining fee and Annual fee Rs 750 each. Annual fee waived on spending Rs 3,00,000+ in the preceding membership year; EMI purchases excluded from spend count.
Welcome benefits: Rs 2,000 flight voucher on spending Rs 10,000 within 60 days of activation + Rs 1,000 hotel voucher + Rs 2,000 holiday voucher on activation.
3% Adani Reward Points on Adani One ecosystem: flights, hotels, trains, buses, cabs, Adani-managed airports, Adani CNG, Adani electricity bills, Trainman.
1.5% on international spends, 1% on other domestic spends, 0.5% on utilities and insurance.
1 Adani Reward Point = Rs 1 (closed-loop currency). Points are redeemable ONLY on the Adani One app or portal — not transferable to airlines or hotel loyalty programs.
Redemption categories on Adani One app: flight bookings, hotel bookings, train/bus/cab bookings, duty-free shopping.
Domestic lounge: 2 complimentary visits per quarter via Visa Lounge Access; 8 per year total. Excluded from the standard ICICI Rs 75,000 quarterly spend threshold requirement.
Other airport perks: 2 complimentary premium lounge upgrades per quarter, 2 premium car parking and 2 valet car parking services per year, 4 domestic porter services per year.
1% fuel surcharge waiver on transactions up to Rs 4,000 at fuel outlets.
